case_title: ME CAL INC VS. JOLLY WHEELS

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ME CAL INC DBA MIDAS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY ME CAL INC DBA MIDAS AS TO DEFENDANT JOLLY WHEELS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
